prompt.en: Generate the character from the current attributes: Jingting Qiyuan, codename Leaf Listener. Single character only. Full body visible from head to boots. Bulky soft-strong adult male, broad shoulders, thick chest, substantial rounded powerful build, warm wheat skin, square-round face, deep chestnut-black short hair with a thin pale moss-green highlight, tea-brown eyes with a faint green ring, gentle alert expression. Modern urban fantasy community plant quarantine inspector. Outfit: clean fitted white sleeveless top tucked into high-waist pants, open sage-green short-sleeve quarantine shirt with rolled cuffs, warm gray high-waist wide-leg work pants with side sampling pouch, cream mid socks, pale gray slip-resistant garden-district shoes, half-palm white quarantine gloves, narrow sampling belt with small shears and sealed tubes, leaf-gold vein-listening wrist ring, transparent pale-green leaf specimen pendant. Subtle low-glow leaf-vein marks only on the wrist ring and tiny badge details, restrained and compact, no diffuse glow. Clean Kyoto Animation-like TV anime cel shading, crisp readable linework, tidy shadow shapes, fresh colors, clean modern urban fantasy design, minimal dirt and grime. Urban first, fantasy second; no gritty industrial mood. The style reference is only for body proportion and drawing style; do not copy the reference character. No UI, no infographic, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no labels, no icons, no scenery. Pure flat chroma-key background only. Use flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background; do not use #ff00ff or similar magenta, pink, rose, or violet anywhere on the character.
prompt.cn: 生成当前属性中的角色：镜庭栖原，单人全身，从头到鞋完整可见。高大柔壮成年男性，宽肩厚胸，厚实圆润但有力量，暖麦色皮肤，方圆脸，深栗黑短发带浅苔绿细挑染，茶褐眼带浅绿环，温和警觉表情。现代都市幻想，社区植物检疫师。服装为干净白色贴身无袖上衣扎进高腰裤，敞开的鼠尾草绿短袖检疫衬衫，温灰高腰宽腿工作裤，米白中筒袜，浅灰防滑园区鞋，半掌白色检疫手套，窄型采样腰带，腕部叶金色叶脉听诊环，透明浅绿叶片标本坠和封样管。低光叶脉标记只出现在腕环和少量小徽记上，克制、不扩散。干净京都动画感 TV 动画赛璐璐，上色清爽，线条清晰，阴影整洁，城市优先、幻想其次，整体无灰尘无脏污。Single character only. Full body visible from head to boots. Generate the character from the current attributes. The style reference is only for body proportion and drawing style; do not copy the reference character. No UI, no infographic, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no labels, no icons, no scenery. Pure flat chroma-key background only. Use flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background; do not use #ff00ff or similar magenta/pink/violet on the character.

chromaKey.name: magenta
chromaKey.reason: The final image prompt explicitly specifies this chroma-key color, so it overrides automatic color inference.
